dhp100:1: Better than if there were thousands
dhp101:1: Better than if there were thousands
dhp103:2: than the man who would conquer a thousand-thousand men,
dhp103:3: is he who would conquer just one–
dhp105:1: When you’ve trained yourself, living in constant self-control, neither a deva nor gandhabba,
dhp105:2: nor a Mara banded with Brahmas,
dhp105:3: could turn that triumph back into defeat.
dhp106:1: You could, month by month, at a cost of thousands,
dhp106:2: conduct sacrifices a hundred times, or
dhp106:5: Better than a hundred years of sacrifices
dhp106:6: would that act of homage be.
dhp107:1: You could, for a hundred years,
dhp107:2: live in a forest tending a fire,
dhp107:3: or pay a single moment’s homage
dhp107:5: Better than a hundred years of sacrifices
dhp107:6: would that act of homage be.
dhp108:1: Everything offered or sacrificed in the world
dhp108:2: for an entire year by one seeking merit
dhp108:4: Better to pay respect to those who’ve gone the straight way.
dhp110:4: lived by a virtuous person absorbed in jhana.
dhp111:1: And better than a hundred years
dhp111:4: lived by a discerning person absorbed in jhana.
dhp112:1: And better than a hundred years
dhp113:1: And better than a hundred years
dhp113:2: lived without seeing arising & passing away, is
dhp114:1: And better than a hundred years
dhp114:2: lived without seeing the Deathless state, is
dhp115:1: And better than a hundred years
dhp115:2: lived without seeing the ultimate Dhamma, is
